zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seend於大約1437年出生在英國維爾爾希德時，她的父親William Mauleverer IV26歲，母親Jane Conyers23歲。她於1454年與John Haule Stokes I在英國英格蘭維爾爾希德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在她的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾希德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seend于大约1437年出生在英国維爾爾希德时，她的父亲William Mauleverer IV26岁，母亲Jane Conyers23岁。她于1454年与John Haule Stokes I在英国英格兰維爾爾希德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年在她的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾希德。

nameMeanings.name: Mauleverer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal leverier ‘bad harrier’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seend was born about 1437, in Seend, Wiltshire, England, her father, William Mauleverer IV, was 26 and her mother, Jane Conyers, was 23. She married John Haule Stokes I in 1454, in Seend, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1500, in her hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Seend, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seend est née environ 1437, à Seend, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William Mauleverer IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane Conyers, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Haule Stokes I en 1454, à Seend, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1500, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Seend, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seend um 1437 in Seend, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Mauleverer IV 26 und ihre Mutter Jane Conyers 23. Sie hat 1454 in Seend, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom John Haule Stokes I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 64 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Seend, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seend è nata il circa 1437 nel Seend, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, William Mauleverer IV, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Jane Conyers, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Haule Stokes I nel 1454, nel Seend, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1500, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Seend, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seendが約1437年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアセエンドで生まれた時，父William Mauleverer IVは26歳，母Jane Conyersは23歳であった。1454年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアセエンドでJohn Haule Stokes Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアセエンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seend(이)가 대략 1437년 영국 윌츠히르 시드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Mauleverer IV(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Conyers(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 시드에서 John Haule Stokes I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 시드에 묻혔다.

mn.Swinden, Craven, Yorkshire, England: Swinden, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seend nasceu aproximadamente 1437, em Seend, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Mauleverer IV, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane Conyers, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Haule Stokes I em 1454, em Seend, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1500, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Seend, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seend родилась около 1437 г. в местности синд, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Mauleverer IV было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Conyers, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Haule Stokes I в 1454 г. в местности синд, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1500 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности синд, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Mauleverer of Stoakes Hall, of Seend nació aproximadamente 1437, en Seend, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Mauleverer IV, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jane Conyers, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Haule Stokes I en 1454, en Seend, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1500, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Seend, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
